title: PM Read-Only Live Workfront Smoke Extension
objective: Extend the existing operations-web PM live-data smoke so deployment-time proof covers the PM workfront read model and row-scoped decision-history read without introducing any mutation, schema, service, auth, or ingress scope.
required_inputs: Local syntax, build, typecheck, and mocked workfront browser-smoke validation evidence
constrained_outputs: Existing smoke:pm-live-data runner now checks GET /api/v1/reads/pm-workfront shape and AI authority
Existing smoke:pm-live-data runner now checks row-scoped GET /api/v1/reads/decision-history?entity_id=...&limit=25 and accepts empty history truthfully
Existing hosted PM live-data Playwright spec now verifies same-origin PM workfront and narrowed decision-history reads through operations-web ingress
Playwright live-data smoke now installs a mutation sentinel for /api/v1/mutations/** and asserts no mutation request occurs

No new package script, no new endpoint, no SQL or schema migration, no live database write, no service admission, no auth or ingress widening, no assignment mutation, no schedule mutation, and no autonomous AI business-state action
validation_steps: Run node syntax check for the smoke-pm-live-data runner
Run focused mocked PM workfront Playwright smoke
Record that the actual hosted smoke command is deployment-targeted and was not run against production before this clean-main change is deployed
Run packet JSON validation and git diff whitespace checks before publication
sql_permission_note: Packet 2026-05-15-pm-lane-009 changes only existing operations-web smoke tooling and tests. No SQL, schema migration, production data write, auth, ingress, backend endpoint, or new mutation authority is authorized.
